title: SCP-063 | The World's Best TothBrush
description: A blue toothbrush with the ability to permanently erase non-living matter.
body:
![The World's Best TothBrush](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_53cd48c9-e60f-4d97-a537-c6f3a9a3c7a3.png)   *** **The World's Best TothBrush** mod adds three new items _(SCP, documentation and label)_ and one structure to the game. The mod is heavily inspired by **SCP-063** from the **SCP Foundation Universe**. **SCP-063** is a blue toothbrush with the ability to **permanently erase non-living matter**. In this mod, **SCP-063** can __erase every non-organic block__, __non-living creature__, and much … much more!   **●** Mod __made by :__ TheCaptainFoxy (me) ● My __second mod created with__ MCreator ● Requires [GeckoLib forge 1.20.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8BmcQJ2H/versions/HVdLnQMI/geckolib-forge-1.20.1-4.8.3.jar) **●** Mod inspired by zcoper's mods       __FAQ__ 
Spoiler

 ► Where can I find the mod content?

None of the items in this mod are craftable.  
SCP-063, its documentation, and its label can only be found inside the SCP-063 containment chamber structure.

 

► Where does the structure spawn?

The structure spawns in any Overworld biome at surface level, with approximately one structure every 4000 blocks. 

 

You can find it using /locate command

 

► What block/entity is erased by SCP-063?

The World's Best TothBrush can erase every "UNDEAD" mob, and every block non tagged with "minecraft:planks", "minecraft:logs", "minecraft:crops", "minecraft:flowers", "minecraft:leaves", "minecraft:saplings", "minecraft:grass", "minecraft:bamboo", "minecraft:fungus", "minecraft:water_plants", "minecraft:grass_block" or fluid/that can be fertilized with bone meal


SCP-063 in the "decomposition state" also erase every item dropped on the ground

 

If you want to create a block/entity mod compatible with SCP-063, make sure it meets these criteria.

 

► How can I place the document?

Right-click to read the document.  
Shift + right-click to place it.

 

► How can I place and take from the ground SCP-063?

Shift + right-click to place it.
Shift + right-click on it placed to take it from the ground.

If you try to break it when placed it will not drop.

 

  *** ![SCP-063 Label](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c799c4634358245f777ad8616aaafadd9668e2f.png) *** ![SCP-063](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9d68908773777878137b9f0c83d294f46bb7de4.png) *** **SCP-063** is _"The World's Best Toothbrush"_, a blue toothbrush with the ability to **permanently erase non-living matter**. In this mod, **SCP-063** can **erase every non-organic block**, **non-living creature**, and much… much more!   **Right-clicking** a block while holding **SCP-063** will activate it and **erase the clicked block**. **Holding right-click** with **SCP-063** in the air will let you **BRUSH YOUR TEETH!** _the brushing duration is changeable with a gamerule. The default time is **2 REAL-LIFE MINUTES**, but with_ `"/gamerule doSCP063Brush2RealMinutes false"` _you can set it to 5 seconds._ **Brushing your teeth** is **__ESSENTIAL__** in this mod, because if **SCP-063** is not used for brushing your teeth **within 24 Minecraft hours** _(24,000 ticks)_, it will enter a state where **every non-organic block** and **every non-living entity** within a distance of 1 block **will be erased**. **SCP-063** can be placed by **Shift + right-clicking** on a block. If you don’t want the decomposition state to occur, use `"/gamerule doSCP063DecomposeThing false"` to disable it. _A **visual bug** is currently present: if you are holding the item in your hand while it is in the decomposition state and you disable the gamerule, blocks will still appear to be erased, but **only visually**. When **SCP-063 is placed**, this issue does not occur._   _**The World's Best Toothbrush** is compatible with **every** mod._ ***   __Show all content__  
Spoiler

 

 

 

SCP-063 Placed

SCP-063 can be placed on the ground by shift-right-clicking a block while holding the toothbrush.

When placed, SCP-063 maintains the same state as when held in hand, including the time since the last brushing.

Placed SCP-063 is affected by gravity, so it will fall into the depths of the earth if you place it on a non-organic block while in the decomposition state, or if you forget it on a non-organic block and it enters the decomposition state.

Right-clicking placed SCP-063 will brush the item in your hand, erasing it.

Shift-right-clicking placed SCP-063 will pick it up from the ground.

Breaking placed SCP-063 will NOT drop it.

Every non-living entity or dropped item that enters the 1-block radius of placed SCP-063 while it is in the decomposition state will be erased.

If a player enters the 1-block radius of placed SCP-063 while it is in the decomposition state, the player’s inventory will be erased.

 

SCP-063 Containment Chamber

SCP-063 can only be found inside the SCP-063 Containment Chamber/Cell.

"Dr.D----'s Bathroom" 


The structure spawns in any Overworld biome at surface level and is rare.

SCP-063 Document & SCP-063 Label

The SCP-063 documentation can be found inside the SCP-063 Containment Chamber together with The World's Best TothBrush.
The document is readable, while the label provides information about the SCP’s classification and risk level.

   _● SCP Document: _      [SCP-063 Document](https://scp-wiki.wikidot.com/scp-063) ● You have permission to use this mod in your modpacks! _● Check out my other Mods: [My CurseForge Profile](https://www.curseforge.com/members/thecaptainfoxy/projects)_ [My Modrinth Profile]([https://www.curseforge.com/members/thecaptainfoxy/projects](https://modrinth.com/user/TheCaptainFoxy))
